project_type: TypeScript full-stack board game - React+Vite frontend with Zustand store, Express 5 + WebSocket backend
build_system: npm with Vite for frontend, tsx for server. No test framework configured.
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors. 2. Run npx vite build to verify frontend builds.
environment_constraints: No test framework. Verification is TypeScript compilation only.
key_patterns: The Zustand store (gameStore.ts) is the central client state. Online mode uses WebSocket: client sends actions via sendAction(), server processes and broadcasts GAME_STATE to all clients. gameLogic.ts has pure functions that take/return GameState. For online mode, most actions early-return after sendAction, but some (like monster placement) require client-side interactive UI before finalizing on server.
directory_structure: src/store/gameStore.ts (~2915 lines) - Zustand store with all client actions. src/server/index.ts (~1235 lines) - Express+WS server with all message handlers. src/utils/gameLogic.ts (~3552 lines) - Pure game logic functions. src/types/game.ts (~512 lines) - Type definitions. src/components/ - React components including ActionPanel, HarvestPopup.
